contextCold.command: /usr/bin/time -l node .../dist/cli/index.js context DoorObj --repo neonnew-core --file Assets/NEON/Code/Game/Doors/DoorObj.cs --unity-resources auto

contextWarm.command: /usr/bin/time -l node .../dist/cli/index.js context DoorObj --repo neonnew-core --file Assets/NEON/Code/Game/Doors/DoorObj.cs --unity-resources auto

targetedTests.command: npm --prefix gitnexus run build && node --test gitnexus/dist/mcp/local/unity-lazy-overlay.test.js gitnexus/dist/mcp/local/unity-lazy-hydrator.test.js gitnexus/dist/core/unity/resolver.test.js gitnexus/dist/mcp/local/unity-enrichment.test.js

notes: Cold context memory reduced below 2GB for the measured heavy symbol case.
Warm context remains above 1s in current real-repo measurements; threshold gate intentionally fails on warmMs.
Lazy hydration now supports chunking, budget caps, and in-flight dedupe; diagnostics include budget exceed signals.
